meaning: n.议价,讨价,商讨,商谈,交易,交涉
examples: After much hard bargaining we reached an agreement.
The government has called for sensible pay bargaining.
The release of prisoners was used as a bargaining chip.
Expect the NFL to extend their collective bargaining agreement before the 2006 season starts.
In just the past two years, Wisconsin put limits on collective bargaining for state employees.
